# Contributing to JameStream

Bug reports and focused pull requests are welcome. Before opening a pull
request:

1. Explain the problem and the expected behavior.
2. Keep advertising, pop-under, promotional, and third-party tracking loaders
   out of the application.
3. Run `pnpm test`, `pnpm lint`, and `pnpm build`.
4. Do not commit API tokens, account credentials, or private service URLs.

JameStream is derived from upstream MIT-licensed projects. Preserve applicable
copyright and license notices when porting upstream work.
